name: agent-sdlc
description: Reusable zero-config issue intake, worker dispatch, evidence, review, and merge-ready software development lifecycle workflows.

interface.longDescription: Agent SDLC helps Codex run repeatable software development workflows across GitHub Issues, branches, pull requests, and communicating threads without consumer repo config. It can turn rough requests into scoped issues with saved worker dispatch prompts and CI tiers, route issues to the next SDLC role, preflight worker dispatch, refresh current-head evidence, run implementer/reviewer loops, and coordinate merge-ready PRs.
defaultPrompt: Use Agent SDLC to intake issues, route the next SDLC role, dispatch workers, refresh evidence, and run structured implementer/reviewer workflows.
